display.purpose: Hero names, primary section headers, and first-load welcome moments.

headline.purpose: Section titles and large proof-surface headings.

title.purpose: Project titles, role titles, skill category headings, and card headings.

body.purpose: Project descriptions, recruiter-facing summaries, resume copy, and form labels.

label.purpose: Pills, buttons, badges, metadata, and compact navigation.

shadows.name: cta-glow
shadows.purpose: Signal hover state for recruiter-critical CTAs.

shadows.name: research-hover
shadows.purpose: Subtle violet lift for research cards.

motion.name: standard-out
motion.purpose: Navbar, menu, and polished reveal transitions.

components.name: Primary Recruiter CTA
components.description: Use for resume, contact, live work, and other hiring actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border:1px solid rgba(45,212,191,.5);border-radius:999px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#14b8a6,#14b8a6,#0d9488);color:#fff;padding:12px 32px;font:600 16px/1.2 system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;transition:transform .2s ease,box-shadow .2s ease,background .2s ease}.ds-btn-primary svg{width:20px;height:20px}.ds-btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);background:linear-gradient(90deg,#2dd4bf,#14b8a6,#10b981);box-shadow:0 0 24px rgba(20,184,166,.45)}.ds-btn-primary:focus-visible{outline:3px solid rgba(34,211,238,.65);outline-offset:3px}

components.name: Secondary Recruiter CTA
components.description: Use beside a primary CTA when the action is important but not dominant.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:999px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);color:#fff;padding:12px 32px;font:600 16px/1.2 system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;transition:transform .2s ease,border-color .2s ease,background .2s ease,box-shadow .2s ease}.ds-btn-secondary svg{width:20px;height:20px}.ds-btn-secondary:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);border-color:rgba(34,211,238,.5);background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);box-shadow:0 0 18px rgba(34,211,238,.18)}.ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible{outline:3px solid rgba(34,211,238,.65);outline-offset:3px}

components.name: Technical Tag Chip
components.description: Use for project tags, technology lists, and recruiter-scannable metadata.

components.name: Flat Technical Panel
components.description: Default surface for skills, contact details, experience, and proof content.
components.html:
Current Role

Trainee Software Engineer

Building AI-powered applications, scalable APIs, and polished full-stack products.

components.name: Dark Input Field
components.description: Use for contact form fields and future recruiter inquiry forms.
components.css: .ds-field{display:grid;gap:8px;color:#9ca3af;font:500 14px/1.2 system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif}.ds-field input{border:1px solid #374151;border-radius:12px;background:rgba(31,41,55,.5);color:#fff;padding:12px 16px;font:400 16px/1.4 system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;transition:border-color .2s ease,box-shadow .2s ease,background .2s ease}.ds-field input::placeholder{color:#9ca3af}.ds-field input:focus{outline:none;border-color:#14b8a6;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(20,184,166,.22);background:rgba(31,41,55,.72)}

components.name: Compact Glass Navigation
components.description: Fixed recruiter navigation with profile identity, section links, and social actions.
components.css: .ds-nav{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;border:1px solid rgba(99,102,241,.25);border-radius:999px;background:rgba(5,5,15,.85);color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);padding:8px 12px;font:500 14px/1.2 system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;backdrop-filter:blur(24px) saturate(1.5);box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.45)}.ds-nav-logo{display:grid;place-items:center;width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:999px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#8b5cf6,#38bdf8);color:#fff;font-weight:800;margin-right:6px}.ds-nav a{border-radius:999px;color:inherit;text-decoration:none;padding:8px 12px;transition:color .2s ease,background .2s ease}.ds-nav a:hover,.ds-nav a.is-active{background:rgba(139,92,246,.15);color:#fff}.ds-nav a:focus-visible{outline:3px solid rgba(34,211,238,.65);outline-offset:3px}

narrative.overview:
This portfolio should feel like a focused technical command surface built for hiring decisions: dark, sharp, data-rich, and easy to scan. The current identity is a near-black engineering environment with teal/cyan action signals, violet AI-atmosphere accents, strong system UI typography, profile imagery, project screenshots, and controlled kinetic reveals.

The system is not trying to be cute, playful, or template-cyber. It should make recruiters trust the person behind the interface: the work is organized, the calls to action are unmistakable, and the visual effects support proof rather than distracting from it.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black technical surfaces with restrained grid, glow, and particle atmosphere.
Teal/cyan as the primary hiring-action signal for resume, contact, GitHub, and live project links.
Violet/indigo used as secondary AI energy, never as the whole personality.
Flat technical panels with thin borders and tonal layering; glow belongs mostly to hover and hero moments.
Motion is choreographed enough to feel built, but scanning should stay fast.

rules.name: The Recruiter Action Rule
rules.body: Teal/cyan must identify the next hiring action: view resume, download PDF, contact, open GitHub, open LinkedIn, or view live work.

rules.name: The Atmosphere Is Secondary Rule
rules.body: Violet, indigo, pink, grids, particles, and glows may create AI atmosphere, but they must not bury project evidence or recruiter actions.

rules.name: The One-Family Confidence Rule
rules.body: Keep the current system font stack unless a future redesign deliberately chooses a recruiter-grade type direction; do not add a reflex display font just to look designed.

rules.name: The Label Restraint Rule
rules.body: Use uppercase and wide tracking only for resume headers or compact status labels. Repeated tiny uppercase section eyebrows are forbidden.

rules.name: The Flat Technical Panel Rule
rules.body: Panels rest flat with tonal fill and one-pixel borders; glow appears only for hover, focus, or one primary hero moment.

rules.name: The No Template Shine Rule
rules.body: Do not pair a generic 1px border with a huge decorative shadow across every card. If everything glows, no recruiter signal is visible.

dos: Do make recruiter actions unmistakable with Signal Teal and Data Cyan on resume, contact, GitHub, LinkedIn, and live-work links.
Do keep the interface professional, mature, and technically confident.
Do use real project screenshots, profile imagery, resume content, and measurable technical proof before adding atmosphere.
Do keep dark panels flat and precise at rest, with glow reserved for hover, focus, and hero emphasis.
Do preserve strong contrast on all gray text over black surfaces; muted copy still needs to be readable.
Do provide reduced-motion alternatives for GSAP, Framer Motion, loader, cursor, and scroll-triggered reveals.
donts: Don't make the portfolio childish, playful, or novelty-driven.
Don't use generic AI-template aesthetics, overused cyber decorations without substance, or template-like portfolio sections.
Don't let violet/pink glow overpower teal/cyan recruiter actions.
Don't use gradient text as the default answer for every heading; use solid white headings with accent only where emphasis is earned.
Don't repeat tiny uppercase tracked labels above every section as generic scaffolding.
Don't use thick side-stripe borders, nested cards, or soft decorative shadows on every surface.
Don't hide real proof behind animation; content must be visible and scannable even if motion is reduced or delayed.
